summary: P12: PWA + service worker — manifest.webmanifest, sw.js (app-shell-only), install-to-home-screen on iOS+Android

resolution.note: Manifest + service worker shipped. App-shell-only caching strategy (no API). Production SW registration via vite import.meta.env.PROD. ICON ASSETS (192/512 PNGs) need to be added by user before first phone install — flagged in commit message.
